title: Stairwell
description: The Stairwell internal-enrichment connector enriches OpenCTI observables with intelligence from Stairwell's global file corpus and network telemetry. For file observables it adds MalEval verdicts, Stairwell AI File Triage write-ups, file metadata (magic, imphash, TLSH, entropy, YARA matches), variant discovery with 'derived-from' links, and per-asset sightings from the customer's environment. For domain, IP, and autonomous-system observables it adds DNS resolution history, IP intelligence, and WHOIS. Scores are raised monotonically from MalEval verdicts, and enrichment output is written as STIX Notes, relationships, and custom properties.
short_description: Enriches file, domain, IP, and ASN observables with Stairwell intelligence: MalEval verdicts, AI file triage, YARA matches, variant discovery, sightings, DNS history, and WHOIS.
